prompt: Analyze competitors for T-Systems' cloud-migration proposition in the grosse-energieversorger-de market. Research Accenture, Capgemini, and IBM specifically. Include trap questions for each competitor. After generation, run the stakeholder review loop: CSO (tsystems-cso-reviewer) and Market Industry Analyst (market-industry-analyst-reviewer) score the competitive analysis, failing dimensions get rewritten via competitor-researcher revision mode with merged feedback, loop continues until thresholds met (avg >= 4.0, no dimension < 3) or max 3 iterations.

assertions.text: Each has positioning, strengths, weaknesses, differentiation
Source URLs present for each competitor
No dimension below 3 from either reviewer
At least one competitor file was rewritten (loop exercised)
